code:
---
title: Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (Security_IntrusionDetection)
---

stateDiagram-v2
    %% Visit Operational Status
    state "VisitOperationalStatus" as VisitOperational {Security_IntrusionDetection] --> Planned : Reservation Confirmed
        Planned --> PendingEntry : Vehicle Nearing Lot (Security_Firewall)
        PendingEntry --> EnteredLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Entry Gate / Gate Opened
        PendingEntry --> Cancelled : Reservation NoShow / Expired before entry
        
        EnteredLot --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle Passed Entry Gate, Awaiting Slot Assignment or In Free-Roam
        ActiveInLot --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned (Security_OAuth2)
        ActiveInLot --> AwaitingSlotAssignment : Vehicle in lot, but no slot yet (Security_OAuth2)
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned for Valet Park
        
        SlotAssigned --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle leaves slot, becomes Free-Roam (Security_ZeroTrust)
        SlotAssigned --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened
        ActiveInLot --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened (Security_IntrusionDetection)

        ExitedLot --> CompletedOperational : Post-exit processing complete (Security_Firewall)
        
        %% Error / Exception States for Operational
        Planned --> FailedToEnter : Technical issue at gate, reservation remains
        PendingEntry --> FailedToEnter
        EnteredLot --> Interrupted : e.g., System outage, vehicle stuck in lot
        ActiveInLot --> Interrupted
        SlotAssigned --> Interrupted
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> Interrupted
        Interrupted --> ExitedLot : Manual Override Exit
        Interrupted --> Abandoned : Vehicle left in lot after prolonged interruption
        Interrupted --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated, forced evacuation
        
        %% Emergency evacuation can happen from any active state
        EnteredLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        ActiveInLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated  
        SlotAssigned --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        
        Abandoned --> [Security_OAuth2]
        CompletedOperational --> [Security_Firewall]
        Cancelled --> [Security_ZeroTrust]
        FailedToEnter --> [Security_Firewall]
        EmergencyEvacuated --> [Security_Encryption]
    }

    %% Visit Billing Status (Security_IntrusionDetection)
    state "VisitBillingStatus" as VisitBilling {Security_OAuth2] --> PendingPriceQuote : Visit Started (Security_OAuth2)
        PendingPriceQuote --> PriceQuoteReceived : Pricing Service responds
        PriceQuoteReceived --> PendingPayment : Price confirmed, awaiting customer payment
        PendingPayment --> PaymentInProgress : Customer initiates payment
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentConfirmed : Payment successful (Security_Firewall)
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentFailed : Payment attempt failed
        PaymentFailed --> PendingPayment : Retry Payment
        PaymentFailed --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Multiple failures or issue
        
        PaymentConfirmed --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Billing cycle complete for this visit
        
        %% Alternative Billing Flows
        PendingPriceQuote --> GraceExempt_NoCharge : Visit qualifies for no charge (Security_OAuth2)
        GraceExempt_NoCharge --> BillingFinalized_Paid : (Security_Firewall)

        PriceQuoteReceived --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Price calculation error or dispute
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Manual resolution leads to payment
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Unpaid : Manual resolution leads to write-off or deferral
        
        BillingFinalized_Paid --> [Security_ZeroTrust]
        BillingFinalized_Unpaid --> [Security_ZeroTrust]
    }
    
    note right of VisitOperational
      VisitOperationalStatus:
      - Planned
      - PendingEntry
      - EnteredLot
      - ActiveInLot
      - AwaitingSlotAssignment
      - SlotAssigned
      - ExitedLot
      - Interrupted
      - Abandoned
      - EmergencyEvacuated
      - CompletedOperational (Security_Encryption)
      - Cancelled (Security_Encryption)
      - FailedToEnter 
    end note

    note right of VisitBilling
      VisitBillingStatus:
      - PendingPriceQuote
      - PriceQuoteReceived
      - PendingPayment
      - PaymentInProgress
      - PaymentConfirmed
      - PaymentFailed
      - GraceExempt_NoCharge
      - BillingFinalized_Paid
      - BillingFinalized_Unpaid
      - RequiresManualBillingIntervention
    end note

    %% Linking Operational and Billing states (Security_ZeroTrust)
    %% This is hard to show perfectly in Mermaid for parallel states that are not time-synchronized
    %% but conceptually:
    %% ExitedLot (Security_Encryption) often triggers final billing actions if not already paid.
    %% PaymentConfirmed (Security_Firewall) can influence ExitedLot (Security_OAuth2) if exit is gated by payment.
    %% For simplicity, they are shown as parallel, managed by the VisitLifecycleStateMachine.
    
    %% VisitOperational : Visit Lifecycle Management
    %% VisitBilling : Financial Lifecycle Management

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Easy Park Plus系统绘制一个完整的访问状态图，重点突出安全层面的设计。整个流程要分成两条主线：运营状态和计费状态，两者是并行的。
明白了，两条主线并行处理。那运营状态这边从哪个节点开始？是用户预约确认之后吗？
对，起点是Planned状态，表示预约已确认。然后车辆接近停车场时进入PendingEntry，这里要加上Security_Firewall的安全检查。
好的，Planned到PendingEntry的转换已经画好了，标注了Vehicle Nearing Lot和Security_Firewall。接下来是入口闸机？
没错，PendingEntry之后有两个分支：一是ANPR识别成功进入EnteredLot，二是超时未入场变成Cancelled。还要考虑技术故障导致的FailedToEnter。
已添加PendingEntry到EnteredLot和Cancelled的两条路径，还有FailedToEnter的异常分支。EnteredLot之后是ActiveInLot对吧？
是的，车辆通过闸机后就是ActiveInLot，这时候有两种情况：要么已经分配了车位SlotAssigned，要么还在等车位AwaitingSlotAssignment。这两个转换都要走Security_OAuth2认证。
画好了，ActiveInLot分出两条带Security_OAuth2的转换。AwaitingSlotAssignment之后可以转到SlotAssigned，这个我理解是代客泊车的场景？
对，就是代客泊车分配具体车位。另外SlotAssigned可以转回ActiveInLot，表示车辆离开车位变成自由漫游，这里要用Security_ZeroTrust。
SlotAssigned到ActiveInLot的逆向转换已添加，标注了Security_ZeroTrust。离场流程怎么设计？
SlotAssigned和ActiveInLot都可以直接到ExitedLot，都是ANPR识别出口闸机。ActiveInLot这条要加上Security_IntrusionDetection，因为自由漫游状态离场需要额外监控。
两条到ExitedLot的路径都画好了，ActiveInLot那条特别标注了Security_IntrusionDetection。ExitedLot之后是CompletedOperational？
是的，CompletedOperational表示离场后处理完成，走Security_Firewall。运营状态这边还有几个异常状态要补充：Interrupted、Abandoned和EmergencyEvacuated。
Interrupted的触发条件是什么？从哪些状态可以进入？
系统故障或者车辆被困在停车场时触发。EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment都可以进入Interrupted。Interrupted之后有三个出口：手动放行到ExitedLot、超时变成Abandoned、或者紧急疏散到EmergencyEvacuated。
Interrupted的入口和三个出口都画好了。EmergencyEvacuated只能从Interrupted进入吗？
不对，紧急疏散可以从任何活跃状态直接触发。EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment都要能直接到EmergencyEvacuated。
已修正，从四个活跃状态都添加了到EmergencyEvacuated的直接转换。现在处理终端状态的安全标注？
对，Abandoned接Security_OAuth2，CompletedOperational和FailedToEnter接Security_Firewall，EmergencyEvacuated接Security_Encryption。运营状态部分先这样，现在看计费状态VisitBilling。
终端状态的安全标注都加好了。VisitBilling的起点是什么？
PendingPriceQuote，访问开始时触发，走Security_OAuth2。然后是PriceQuoteReceived，等计价服务响应。
PendingPriceQuote到PriceQuoteReceived已连接。接下来是付款流程？
对，PriceQuoteReceived到PendingPayment表示价格确认等待付款，然后PaymentInProgress是客户发起支付，成功的话到PaymentConfirmed走Security_Firewall，失败的话到PaymentFailed。
付款主流程画好了。PaymentFailed之后可以重试？
是的，PaymentFailed可以回到PendingPayment重试，或者多次失败后进入RequiresManualBillingIntervention人工介入。PaymentConfirmed之后是BillingFinalized_Paid。
PaymentFailed的两个出口和PaymentConfirmed到BillingFinalized_Paid都画好了。人工介入之后有两个结果？
对，RequiresManualBillingIntervention可以 resolved 成BillingFinalized_Paid，或者写成坏账/延期到BillingFinalized_Unpaid。这两个最终状态都接Security_ZeroTrust。
人工介入分支和终端状态的安全标注都完成了。还有别的特殊流程吗？
有，免费豁免流程。PendingPriceQuote可以直接到GraceExempt_NoCharge，比如短时间停留免费，然后直接到BillingFinalized_Paid，走Security_Firewall。另外PriceQuoteReceived也可以直接到RequiresManualBillingIntervention，处理计价错误或者争议。
免费豁免流程和计价争议路径都添加好了。现在两个并行状态机之间有关联吗？
概念上是有关联的，但时序不同步。比如ExitedLot经常触发最终计费，PaymentConfirmed可能影响出口闸机放行。不过图上用注释说明就行，标注这是Security_ZeroTrust管理的并行状态。
明白了，用注释说明关联关系。需要给两个状态机加详细注释吗？
对，右边加两个note，分别列出VisitOperationalStatus和VisitBillingStatus包含的所有状态，方便查阅。
两个note都添加好了，列出了所有状态。图的整体结构差不多了，需要调整什么吗？
标题要体现安全主题，用Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (Security_IntrusionDetection)。另外检查一下Planned到PendingEntry的转换，开头是不是漏了Security_IntrusionDetection的标注？
确实漏了，Planned到PendingEntry应该标注Security_IntrusionDetection。现在补上了。
还有VisitBilling的入口，PendingPriceQuote前面应该是Security_IntrusionDetection，不是Security_OAuth2。Security_OAuth2是转换的标注。
修正了，VisitBilling的入口状态标注为Security_IntrusionDetection，PendingPriceQuote的进入转换才是Security_OAuth2。
最后确认一下所有安全层的分布：Security_IntrusionDetection用于入口监控和关键状态触发，Security_Firewall用于常规流程节点，Security_OAuth2用于身份认证相关转换，Security_ZeroTrust用于自由漫游和最终状态。这样设计合理吗？
安全层分布合理，覆盖了不同风险等级的场景。图已经完成了，包含两个并行状态机、完整的正常和异常流程、以及详细的状态注释。
好的，这个状态图可以交付了。后续实现时要确保VisitLifecycleStateMachine能正确管理这两条并行生命周期的同步点。
